Position: Senior Software Engineer
Location: Remote / New York
Company: AI Innovations Corp.

Role Overview:
We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience in Python and FastAPI. You will be responsible for building high-performance AI services and managing real-time data pipelines.

Requirements:
- Strong experience with Python 3.9+
- Knowledge of Vector Databases like FAISS or Pinecone
- Experience with LLM integration (OpenAI, Groq, Anthropic)
- Mastery of Docker and CI/CD pipelines
- Excellent problem-solving skills and mentorship abilities.

Benefits:
- Competitive salary and equity
- Full health, dental, and vision insurance
- Unlimited PTO
- Remote-first culture.

# Contract Terms and Renewal Policy

## Standard Contract Terms

### Contract Duration
- Default contract term: 12 months
- Auto-renewal: Enabled by default
- Renewal notification: 30 days prior to renewal date

### Early Termination
- Termination notice: 30 days written notice required
- Early termination fee: 50% of remaining contract value
- Exception: No fee if service issues documented

### Renewal Process
1. Automatic renewal unless notice provided
2. Pricing locked for renewal period
3. Option to upgrade/downgrade at renewal
4. New features included automatically

## Cancellation Policy

### How to Cancel
- Email: support@company.com
- Portal: Account settings > Cancel subscription
- Phone: Call support team

### Effective Date
- Cancellation effective at end of current billing period
- No partial month refunds
- Access continues until period end

### Data Retention
- 90 days after cancellation
- Export available during retention period
- Permanent deletion after 90 days

## Contract Modifications

### Mid-Contract Changes
- Upgrades: Effective immediately, pro-rated billing
- Downgrades: Effective at next renewal
- User count changes: Adjusted in next billing cycle

### Price Changes
- 60 days notice for price increases
- Option to cancel without penalty during notice period
- Grandfathered pricing for existing customers (12 months)

## Service Level Agreement (SLA)

### Uptime Guarantee
- Standard: 99.5% uptime
- Professional: 99.9% uptime  
- Enterprise: 99.99% uptime with custom SLA

### Credits for Downtime
- Below 99.5%: 10% monthly credit
- Below 99%: 25% monthly credit
- Below 95%: 50% monthly credit

## Legal Terms

### Governing Law
- Jurisdiction: Delaware, USA
- Dispute resolution: Binding arbitration
- Class action waiver: Included

### Data Privacy
- GDPR compliant
- SOC 2 Type II certified
- Data processing agreement available

### Intellectual Property
- Customer retains all rights to their data
- Company retains rights to platform
- No license to customer content beyond service provision

Meeting Title: AI Assistant Project Kickoff
Date: April 8, 2026
Attendees: Alice (Product), Bob (Engineering), Charlie (Design)

Action Items:
1. Bob to finalize the real-time transcription pipeline using Deepgram by Friday.
2. Charlie to share the high-fidelity Figma mockups for the AI Co-pilot interface.
3. Alice to reach out to potential beta testers for the Q2 launch.

Key Decisions:
- We will use Groq for LLM inference due to its superior speed compared to competitors.
- FAISS will be our primary vector store for the local MVP deployment.
- The system must support PDF and DOCX uploads for the Knowledge Base.

Next Sync: Monday at 10 AM.

[Page 1]

[Page 2]

AI Innovations Corp - Remote Work Policy

1. Productivity over Presence: We value output and results over hours spent in an office.
2. Core Hours: Teams should be available for collaboration between 10 AM and 2 PM EST.
3. Equipment: All full-time employees are eligible for a $2000 home-office stipend every 2 years.
4. Security: All company machines must use the approved VPN and the latest security patches for local development.
5. Communication: Use Slack for quick messages, Jira for task tracking, and the AI Meeting Assistant for all video calls to ensure auto-summarization.

Skilled in DevOps practic es 
using C I/CD pipelines, Docker, and cloud environments for automated deployments

EDUCATION  
  B.Tech  in Computer Engineering , GH Raisoni  College  of Engineering  and Management                 7.66 CGPA,            2021 – 2024                  
Diploma in Computer Engineering , Theem College of Engineering                                                    89.89 %  2019 - 2021  
  SKILL  
    Languages: JavaScript (ES6+)  , C++ , Python  
     MERN Stack:  MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js  
     Frontend:  React js,  Next js , Redu x,  HTML, CSS, Tailwind  CSS, Bootstrap , Material UI  
     Backend:  REST APIs, JWT Auth, Middleware, MVC , FastAPI  
     Database:  MongoDB, MySQL  
     Tools:  Git, GitHub, Postman, CI/CD, Docker, AWS  
 
  EXPERIENCE  
Jr

Software  Engineer  – RBRICKKS  Technology,  Pune  (May  2025  – Present)  
• Built a full -stack parcel delivery platform using MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, and Node.js for Users, Drivers, and Admin

Implemented secure payment integration  and optimized APIs for fast processing and seamless user experience

• Optimized APIs and backend workflows for faster response and improved application performance

Followed Agile sprints and full SDLC processes , including feature planning, development, and testing

Software  Intern  - AB infotech Solutions                                                                                                                         (May  2024  - Mar 2025)  
• Developed and optimized dynamic MERN stack web applications, boosting application speed by 70% and scalability, 
while delivering responsive, cross -browser compatible interfaces through close collaboration with the design team

• Conducted rigorous testing and debugging to cut reported bugs by 40%, and leveraged Git to increase website 
accessibility compliance by 30% by adhering to modern web standards  
  
   Open  Source Contribution  | WordPress / Gutenberg  
• Addressed a visual regression in the Boot package’s Connectors page where a black gap appeared on scroll after the 
sidebar was hidden

• Implemented a solution using CSS specificity and flexbox, collaborating with design team feedback to ensure flyout 
menus were not affected

•  Pull request (#76764) merged into Gutenberg and scheduled for WordPress 7.0

PROJECTS  
Transparent Charity Application Using Blockchain  (July  2023 - Dec 2023)  
• Built a platform  using React, Node.js, Express, and Blockchain APIs  called  Crowd -Funding  for NGOs to self -
register and create campaigns  
• Created a dashboard to display active campaigns clearly for NGOs and visitors  
• Enabled easy campaign visibility on the website so interested donors can find and support them  
Online Notes Sharing System using MERN Stack  (Jun 2023 – Dec 2023)  
• Developed a web -based platform for users to register and share notes securely using  MERN Stack

• Managed user and notes databases efficiently, allowing users to update their information and notes in real -time

• Ensured smooth user experience by implementing effective control and tracking of user registrations and associated data .
